screens.title: Professional gym hero image for 180PT. A high-quality, cinematic shot of a modern, well-equipped private personal training studio in Western Sydney with industrial lighting, weights, and premium equipment. The mood is motivating, professional, and high-energy. Darker tones to match a black/dark gray industrial theme.
